description_long: This modern bungalow features a flat roof design with clean, angular lines and a mix of white and orange exterior walls. The structure is surrounded by lush landscaping, including numerous mature trees and manicured hedges, providing privacy and a natural aesthetic. Large glass windows and sliding doors are prominent, allowing for ample natural light and seamless indoor-outdoor living. The property includes a spacious patio area with outdoor seating and a rectangular swimming pool at the rear. A driveway leads to the entrance, flanked by greenery and a low fence. The overall layout emphasizes open space, minimalism, and integration with the surrounding environment.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with white and orange walls, large glass windows, and extensive landscaping, featuring a rear swimming pool and open patio.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, driveway, and symmetrical landscaping with trees and hedges.
description_view_1: Side-rear view highlights the swimming pool, patio area, and dense tree coverage at the back.
description_view_2: Rear view emphasizes the pool, open patio, and the bungalow's integration with the garden.
description_view_3: Side view reveals the angular rooflines, side garden, and additional outdoor seating area.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical with large grouped windows and sliding glass doors
